title: This Cathie Wood Stock Has Growth and Value Written All Over It for 2024
text: Trimble is a balanced business. It has done an excellent job growing its recurring revenue streams.

title: Will Trimble Stock Rebound To Its Pre-Inflation Shock Highs Of $95?
text: Trimble stock (NASDAQ NDAQ : TRMB), a company that specializes in software for navigation, guidance, and control of equipment for various industries, including construction and agriculture, trades at $52 per share, about 36% below the level seen in March 2021. TRMB stock was trading at around $58 in early June 2022, just before the Fed started increasing rates, and is now 11% below that level, compared to 25% gains for the S&P 500 during this period.

title: Jana sees big upside in this unusual technology play serving industries like construction
text: Jana is a very experienced activist investor founded in 2001 by Barry Rosenstein.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Advances Agri-Tech Footprint With Sabanto Deal
text: Trimble's (TRMB) BX992 GNSS and CenterPoint RTX integration empower farmers with precise autonomy, maximizing productivity and efficiency in agriculture.

title: Trimble to Provide Advanced Positioning Systems to Sabanto for Enhanced Autonomous Tractor Performance
text: Trimble's Dual Antenna GNSS receiver and real-time positioning service will provide centimeter-level accuracy for farmers utilizing autonomous equipment WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Dec. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) and Sabanto have announced the integration of Trimble BX992 Dual Antenna GNSS receivers with Trimble CenterPoint® RTX into Sabanto's autonomy solutions.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Up 10.9% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Trimble (TRMB) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
